message:
🌱 Add koordinator: [question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles mission (#808)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current koordinator deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your koordinator version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator\nhelm list -n koordinator 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working koordinator installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review koordinator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant koordinator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator\nkubectl get configmap -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=koordinator\n```\n**What happened:**\nUse ref-cycles as CPI factor.\n**What you expected to happen:**\nUse cycles as CPI factor."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles",

Describe how to verify it\nuse perf to verify\n### \u2163. Special notes for reviews\n\n### V. Checklist\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator\nkubectl get events -n koordinator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
